ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., CCC, FCC, Public) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the healthcare provider type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the healthcare provider */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the healthcare provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider type */,
  "share" REAL /* Percentage share of the healthcare provider type in the county for the given year */,
  "number_of_providers" INTEGER /* Number of providers of the specific type in the county for the given year */,
  "total_patients_served" INTEGER /* Total number of patients served by the providers of the specific type in the county for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_distribution_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_distribution_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_distribution_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., HighRated, LowRated) */,
  "share" REAL /* Percentage share of the rating type in the county for the given year */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the healthcare providers in the county for the given year */,
  "number_of_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_ratings_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_ratings_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
